commands.review_summary:
The PR buffers Codex commandExecution outputDelta text and uses it as fallback final output for trajectory, transcript, and tool-result projection when aggregatedOutput is empty.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main handles outputDelta for verbose progress but final output helpers read only aggregatedOutput. A projector sequence with outputDelta followed by turnCompleted aggregatedOutput null is a high-confidence reproduction path, though I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a ClawSweeper code repair; the code path is otherwise narrow enough for normal maintainer review.

target.title: fix(codex): preserve streamed command output
target.body:
## Summary

- buffer Codex `item/commandExecution/outputDelta` text per command item
- use the buffered text as a fallback when the final `commandExecution.aggregatedOutput` is empty
- cover the transcript, trajectory recorder, and app-server tool result path with a regression test

Fixes #83199.

## Test

```sh
OPENCLAW_VITEST_INCLUDE_FILE=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-include.json npm exec --prefix /tmp --yes --package=node@22.20.0 -- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extensions.config.ts
```

Result:

```
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  48 passed (48)
```

Note: I used Node 22.20.0 for this local run because the system Node 22.22.0 in my environment fails before Vitest starts with `Missing internal module 'internal/deps/brace-expansion'` from `node:path.matchesGlob()`.
target.author: rozmiard
